description: Create a Gantt chart in Wondershare EdrawMax for a database migration project titled 'Oracle to PostgreSQL Migration'. Include the following six project phases with their respective durations and start times: Phase 1: Assessment & Planning (2 weeks, Start: Week 1); Phase 2: Schema Conversion (3 weeks, Start: Week 3); Phase 3: ETL Development (4 weeks, Start: Week 4); Phase 4: Data Migration (3 weeks, Start: Week 8); Phase 5: UAT Testing (3 weeks, Start: Week 10); and Phase 6: Go-Live & Support (2 weeks, Start: Week 13). Save the diagram as /home/ga/migration_gantt.eddx and export it as a PNG image to /home/ga/migration_gantt.png.
